note: A6 :relational pane (facet-list|detail @0.46): the LEFT consent-facet list renders text rows (left_wall edge_energy >= the principled text-present floor 1.0), the center spans into the focused facet's consent-posture breakdown + the A6 contract (entity_core), and the frame stays dark-theme (entity_core luma <= 120). A reference/posture pane — thresholds reflect a legible posture surface, not feed-density. Authored from design intent.
